articles.title: Getting started with ChatGPT
articles.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT, start your first conversation, and discover simple ways to write, brainstorm, and solve problems with AI.

articles.title: Brainstorming with ChatGPT
articles.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT to brainstorm ideas, organize thinking, and turn rough concepts into structured, actionable plans.

articles.title: Writing with ChatGPT
articles.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT for writing to draft, revise, and refine content with clear structure, tone, and intent.

articles.title: ChatGPT for research
articles.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT for research to gather sources, analyze information, and create structured, citation-backed insights.

articles.title: Responsible and safe use of AI
articles.summary: Learn how to use AI responsibly with best practices for safety, accuracy, and transparency when using tools like ChatGPT.

articles.title: Prompting fundamentals
articles.summary: Learn prompting fundamentals and how to write clear, effective prompts to get better, more useful responses from ChatGPT.
